plugins.name: add
plugins.description: Agent Driven Development (ADD) — Coordinated AI agent teams: test-writers, implementers, reviewers, deployers. Spec-driven TDD, trust-but-verify orchestration, maturity lifecycle, away mode, cross-project learning. 13 commands, 12 skills, 15 rules. Zero dependencies.
